ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sa2_regions" (
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each SA2 region */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the SA2 region is located */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code for the state where the SA2 region is located */,
  "sa2_name16" TEXT /* Name of the SA2 region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the SA2 region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the SA2 region (population per square kilometer) */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the SA2 region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* Reference to the SA2 region */,
  "persons_num" INTEGER /* Total number of persons in the SA2 region */,
  "median_persons_age" REAL /* Median age of persons in the SA2 region */,
  "males_num" INTEGER /* Number of males in the SA2 region */,
  "median_male_age" REAL /* Median age of males in the SA2 region */,
  "females_num" INTEGER /* Number of females in the SA2 region */,
  "median_female_age" REAL /* Median age of females in the SA2 region */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the SA2 region */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the SA2 region */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the distribution of ethnicities in the SA2 region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* Reference to the SA2 region */,
  "earners_persons" INTEGER /* Number of earners in the SA2 region */,
  "median_age_of_earners_years" REAL /* Median age of earners in the SA2 region */,
  "gini_coefficient_no" REAL /* Gini coefficient for the SA2 region */,
  "median_aud" REAL /* Median income in AUD for the SA2 region */,
  "mean_aud" REAL /* Mean income in AUD for the SA2 region */,
  "income_aud" REAL /* Total income in AUD for the SA2 region */,
  "income_quintiles" TEXT /* JSON object representing the distribution of income in quintiles */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "wealth_index" REAL /* Index representing the overall wealth of the SA2 region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the income data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* Reference to the SA2 region */,
  "percentage_person_aged_0_14" REAL /* Percentage of persons aged 0-14 in the SA2 region */,
  "percentage_person_aged_15_64" REAL /* Percentage of persons aged 15-64 in the SA2 region */,
  "percentage_person_aged_65_plus" REAL /* Percentage of persons aged 65 and over in the SA2 region */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is literate */,
  "average_years_of_education" REAL /* Average number of years of education completed by the population */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the distribution of education levels */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the education data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* Reference to the SA2 region */,
  "highest_quartile_pc" REAL /* Highest quartile of income in the SA2 region */,
  "income_share_top_5pc" REAL /* Percentage of income shared by the top 5% in the SA2 region */,
  "third_quartile_pc" REAL /* Third quartile of income in the SA2 region */,
  "lowest_quartile_pc" REAL /* Lowest quartile of income in the SA2 region */,
  "income_share_top_1pc" REAL /* Percentage of income shared by the top 1% in the SA2 region */,
  "second_quartile_pc" REAL /* Second quartile of income in the SA2 region */,
  "income_share_top_10pc" REAL /* Percentage of income shared by the top 10% in the SA2 region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is employed */,
  "job_industry_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the distribution of jobs by industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the employment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_data" (
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* Reference to the SA2 region */,
  "bsns_entries" INTEGER /* Number of businesses that entered the SA2 region */,
  "bsns_exits" INTEGER /* Number of businesses that exited the SA2 region */,
  "bsns_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of businesses in the SA2 region */,
  "total_businesses" INTEGER /* Total number of businesses in the SA2 region */,
  "business_type_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the distribution of business types */,
  "business_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by businesses in the SA2 region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the business data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_data" (
  "sa2_code" TEXT /* Reference to the SA2 region */,
  "time_q1" REAL /* Time spent in Q1 */,
  "time_q2" REAL /* Time spent in Q2 */,
  "time_q3" REAL /* Time spent in Q3 */,
  "time_q4" REAL /* Time spent in Q4 */,
  "tot_time" REAL /* Total time spent */,
  "fq1" REAL /* Frequency of Q1 */,
  "fq2" REAL /* Frequency of Q2 */,
  "fq3" REAL /* Frequency of Q3 */,
  "fq4" REAL /* Frequency of Q4 */,
  "public_transport_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population with access to public transport */,
  "average_commute_time" REAL /* Average time spent commuting to work */,
  "transport_mode_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the distribution of transport modes used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transport data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_code")
)
